rationale: The selected candidate (d48b6a4c8bc3a31df12dd7e1b5a790895205677a) is the most complete and accurate. It correctly translates the frontmatter title and subtitle, which the 'current' version failed to do. It captures Dan's informal and punchy style well (e.g., using 'げっ！' for 'Gasp!'). The suggestion from the previous judge regarding the middle dot in 'ビザロ・トロフィールーム' is already present in the candidate's text, so no further high-priority fixes are required.

suggestionLog.match: ビザロートロフィールーム
suggestionLog.replacement: ビザロ・トロフィールーム
suggestionLog.reason: 'Bizzaro' is a reference to the DC Comics character/world where everything is the opposite. Adding a middle dot makes it more readable as a loanword phrase in Japanese.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.
